card_description: John Calvin is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick identifies himself as the "prisoner" archetype from his own novels (*Frolix 8*, *Tears*, *Maze of Death*), arguing that his personal rescue in 3-74 was part of a necessary "printout" of the divine intervention."
